behavior_summary: U8P_RECALL::look is the item's inspect/U8P_RECALL::look handler; it displays a short player-facing text 'recall item' and then suspends — it does not perform teleportation.

U8P_RECALL::use implements the item 'U8P_RECALL::use' behavior: it closes UI, optionally plays an SFX depending on the player's current map, builds a destination menu from discovered-teleporter flags, asks the player to choose a destination (includes a 'Nowhere' cancel option), maps the chosen menu string to an internal destination code, and if a nonzero destination is chosen calls U8P_RECALL::func03C8 to perform the teleport.

U8P_RECALL::func03C8 performs the teleport sequence: plays a SFX, spawns/requests the teleport process (process teleportToEgg) with constants and the destination parameter, waits/suspends around the spawn as needed, and writes the global flag usedRecall to record that the recall was used.
notable_control_flow: On U8P_RECALL::use: close UI (FREE::closeAllGumps), construct local1 as a list of menu option strings conditionally based on many saw...Teleporter flags, always add a 'Nowhere' cancel entry, present menu (Ask) and suspend until player selection is assigned to local2.

Choice mapping: local2 is strcmp-compared against menu strings; mapping sets local3 (an integer destination code) to a nonzero value for real destinations. A special-case mapping exists for 'Carthax Lake' which branches on hydrosFree to select between two internal codes.
Only when local3 != 0 does U8P_RECALL::use call U8P_RECALL::func03C8(param1 = local3).
U8P_RECALL::func03C8 plays a teleport SFX (playSFX), spawns process teleportToEgg(0x01, 0x1E, param1), waits/suspends around the spawn, then sets usedRecall = 1.
open_questions: Exact mapping table of menu strings (local1 entries) to concrete destination code values passed as param1 — inferred but not explicitly enumerated here.
Whether the written flag usedRecall acts as a cooldown/prevent-reuse guard or only as a usage record for quests/statistics.
Precise behavior differences on specific maps (which SFX ids are played and whether alternate flow is triggered) beyond the presence of a map check via Npc::getMap.
Whether teleportToEgg's constant arguments (0x01, 0x1E) have additional side effects or modes that affect the teleport process lifecycle.

main_function.name: U8P_RECALL::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short/inspect description for the recall item to the player (display 'recall item').
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player 'looks at' or inspects the item (item U8P_RECALL::look/inspect handler, processType 0x0208).
Also functions as a fast-area style entry when the actor enters the item's trigger region (enterFastArea semantics inferred).

function_map.name: U8P_RECALL::use
function_map.role: player-facing 'U8P_RECALL::use' handler: build destination menu, capture choice, map to destination code, and invoke teleport helper

function_map.name: U8P_RECALL::func03C8
function_map.role: utility teleport helper: play SFX, spawn process teleportToEgg with a destination parameter, set usedRecall flag

internal_calls.purpose: Invoke the teleport helper with the selected internal destination code (param1) when a real destination is chosen (local3 != 0).

external_calls.purpose: Query the player's current map ID to choose SFX or conditional behavior before presenting the menu or teleporting.
Check whether an SFX is currently playing to avoid overlapping sounds before calling playSFX.
Play a feedback sound when the recall is used (different indices observed depending on map check).
Close UI windows (gumps) before showing the destination menu or proceeding with teleportation.
Present the dynamically-built destination menu (local1) to the player and suspend until a choice is captured into local2.
Play the teleport SFX as part of the teleport sequence.
Spawn/execute the actual teleport process with constants and the destination parameter (param1) to move the player.

reads.name: sawCentralTenebraeTeleporter
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether 'Central Tenebrae' is included in the destination menu (discovery gating).

reads.name: sawPlateauTeleporter
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether 'Plateau' is included in the destination menu.

reads.name: sawUpperCatacombsTeleporter
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether 'Upper Catacombs' is included in the destination menu.

reads.name: sawMountainKingTeleporter
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether 'Hall of the Mountain King' is included in the destination menu.

reads.name: sawArgentrockIsleTeleporter
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether 'Argentrock Isle' is included in the destination menu.

reads.name: sawCarthaxLakeTeleporter
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether 'Carthax Lake' is included in the destination menu; selection mapping also reads hydrosFree.

reads.name: sawDaemonsCragTeleporter
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether 'Daemon\u0027s Crag' is included in the destination menu.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Condition used when mapping the 'Carthax Lake' menu choice to one of two internal destination codes (alternative target selection).

writes.name: usedRecall
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 after initiating the teleport to record that the recall was used (may act as usage record or cooldown guard).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_RECALL::look is the item's inspect/U8P_RECALL::look handler; it displays a short player-facing text 'recall item' and then suspends — it does not perform teleportation.
